message:
feat: Add Google Drive auth detection and response validation

- Add checkGoogleDriveAuth() to detect login redirects and access restrictions
- Add validateGoogleDriveResponse() to detect HTML error pages in responses
- Detect accounts.google.com redirects, "Request access" pages, and error states
- Return actionable error messages with remediation guidance

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
